testcase.name: test_create_override_rule_creates_audit_log
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter143_audit_trail_coverage.py:194: in test_create_override_rule_creates_audit_log assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200 got {resp.status_code}: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200 got 422: {"detail":[{"type":"list_type","loc":["body","conditions"],"msg":"Input should be a valid list","input":{"country":"US"}}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_delete_override_rule_creates_audit_log
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter143_audit_trail_coverage.py:215: in test_delete_override_rule_creates_audit_log assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200 got {resp.status_code}: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200 got 404: {"detail":"Override rule not found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_file_upload_creates_audit_log
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter143_audit_trail_coverage.py:405: in test_file_upload_creates_audit_log assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200 got {resp.status_code}: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200 got 422: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","file"],"msg":"Field required","input":null}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_file_upload_creates_audit_trail_entry
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter143_audit_trail_coverage.py:423: in test_file_upload_creates_audit_trail_entry assert resp.status_code == 200 E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
